endpoints.name: GET /b
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of buckets for a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /b
endpoints.description: Creates a new bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}
endpoints.description: Returns metadata for the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: PUT /b/{bucket}
endpoints.description: Updates a bucket. Changes to the bucket will be readable immediately after writing, but configuration changes may take time to propagate.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: DELETE /b/{bucket}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes an empty bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: PATCH /b/{bucket}
endpoints.description: Patches a bucket. Changes to the bucket will be readable immediately after writing, but configuration changes may take time to propagate.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/acl
endpoints.description: Retrieves ACL entries on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{bucket}/acl
endpoints.description: Creates a new ACL entry on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Returns the ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: PUT /b/{bucket}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Updates an ACL entry on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: DELETE /b/{bucket}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes the ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: PATCH /b/{bucket}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Patches an ACL entry on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/defaultObjectAcl
endpoints.description: Retrieves default object ACL entries on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{bucket}/defaultObjectAcl
endpoints.description: Creates a new default object ACL entry on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/defaultObjectAcl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Returns the default object ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: PUT /b/{bucket}/defaultObjectAcl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Updates a default object ACL entry on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: DELETE /b/{bucket}/defaultObjectAcl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes the default object ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: PATCH /b/{bucket}/defaultObjectAcl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Patches a default object ACL entry on the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/iam
endpoints.description: Returns an IAM policy for the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: PUT /b/{bucket}/iam
endpoints.description: Updates an IAM policy for the specified bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/iam/testPermissions
endpoints.description: Tests a set of permissions on the given bucket to see which, if any, are held by the caller.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{bucket}/lockRetentionPolicy
endpoints.description: Locks retention policy on a bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/notificationConfigs
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of notification subscriptions for a given bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{bucket}/notificationConfigs
endpoints.description: Creates a notification subscription for a given bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/notificationConfigs/{notification}
endpoints.description: View a notification configuration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NOTIFICATION}} with a real notification. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: DELETE /b/{bucket}/notificationConfigs/{notification}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a notification subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NOTIFICATION}} with a real notification. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/o
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of objects matching the criteria.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{bucket}/o
endpoints.description: Stores a new object and metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{bucket}/o/watch
endpoints.description: Watch for changes on all objects in a bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/o/{object}
endpoints.description: Retrieves an object or its metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: PUT /b/{bucket}/o/{object}
endpoints.description: Updates an object's metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: DELETE /b/{bucket}/o/{object}
endpoints.description: Deletes an object and its metadata. Deletions are permanent if versioning is not enabled for the bucket, or if the generation parameter is used.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: PATCH /b/{bucket}/o/{object}
endpoints.description: Patches an object's metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/acl
endpoints.description: Retrieves ACL entries on the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/acl
endpoints.description: Creates a new ACL entry on the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Returns the ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: PUT /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Updates an ACL entry on the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: DELETE /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes the ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: PATCH /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/acl/{entity}
endpoints.description: Patches an ACL entry on the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket. Replace {{ENTITY}} with a real entity.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/iam
endpoints.description: Returns an IAM policy for the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: PUT /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/iam
endpoints.description: Updates an IAM policy for the specified object.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: GET /b/{bucket}/o/{object}/iam/testPermissions
endpoints.description: Tests a set of permissions on the given object to see which, if any, are held by the caller.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OBJECT}} with a real object. Replace {{BUCKET}} with a real bucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{destinationBucket}/o/{destinationObject}/compose
endpoints.description: Concatenates a list of existing objects into a new object in the same bucket.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATIONBUCKET}} with a real destinationbucket. Replace {{DESTINATIONOBJECT}} with a real destinationobject.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{sourceBucket}/o/{sourceObject}/copyTo/b/{destinationBucket}/o/{destinationObject}
endpoints.description: Copies a source object to a destination object. Optionally overrides metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATIONOBJECT}} with a real destinationobject. Replace {{SOURCEBUCKET}} with a real sourcebucket. Replace {{SOURCEOBJECT}} with a real sourceobject. Replace {{DESTINATIONBUCKET}} with a real destinationbucket.

endpoints.name: POST /b/{sourceBucket}/o/{sourceObject}/rewriteTo/b/{destinationBucket}/o/{destinationObject}
endpoints.description: Rewrites a source object to a destination object. Optionally overrides metadata.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATIONOBJECT}} with a real destinationobject. Replace {{SOURCEBUCKET}} with a real sourcebucket. Replace {{SOURCEOBJECT}} with a real sourceobject. Replace {{DESTINATIONBUCKET}} with a real destinationbucket.

endpoints.name: POST /channels/stop
endpoints.description: Stop watching resources through this channel
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /projects/{projectId}/hmacKeys
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of HMAC keys matching the criteria.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: POST /projects/{projectId}/hmacKeys
endpoints.description: Creates a new HMAC key for the specified service account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: GET /projects/{projectId}/hmacKeys/{accessId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves an HMAC key's metadata
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ACCESSID}} with a real accessid.

endpoints.name: PUT /projects/{projectId}/hmacKeys/{accessId}
endpoints.description: Updates the state of an HMAC key. See the HMAC Key resource descriptor for valid states.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ACCESSID}} with a real accessid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /projects/{projectId}/hmacKeys/{accessId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an HMAC key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid. Replace {{ACCESSID}} with a real accessid.

endpoints.name: GET /projects/{projectId}/serviceAccount
endpoints.description: Get the email address of this project's Google Cloud Storage service account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.
